title: Investor Visa Lawyers | Experienced US Investor Visa Law Firm
content:
## Investor Visa Lawyers for Entrepreneurs & Global Investors
At Colombo & Hurd, we guide individuals and businesses through the complexities of U.S. investor visas, including  E-2 Treaty Investor Visas and EB-5 Immigrant Investor Visas. Our experienced attorneys develop tailored strategies aligned with your business goals, managing everything from approvals to renewals, to give you the freedom to pursue your business goals within the United States.
With one-on-one support and advanced technology, we keep you informed and your case on track—so you can focus on growing your investments while we handle your path to the U.S.

### Permanent Residence (Green Card) Visas
- EB-5 Visa For Immigrant Investors
For Immigrant Investors
- E-2 Visa For Treaty Investors
For Treaty Investors

## Why Choose Colombo & Hurd’s Investor Visa Attorneys

### Proven Experience with Investor Visas
Our experienced attorneys have a strong track record representing investors seeking U.S. visas to conduct business, manage investments, or work for a U.S. branch or subsidiary.

### Full-Service Legal Support
We handle all corporate and immigration filings on your behalf, ensuring compliance and maximizing long-term success.

### Exclusive Technology Platform
Our proprietary case management system keeps your case moving efficiently, providing clear updates and next steps—giving you confidence and control throughout your journey.

### Global Reach, Local Support
With over 450 team members across the U.S., Latin America, and around the globe, we serve professionals worldwide with personalized guidance that feels close to home—wherever you are.

### Reputation for Excellence
With an AV rating from Martindale-Hubbell—the highest rating awarded based on peer reviews from other attorneys—and an A+ BBB rating, we’re recognized for our excellence and client-focused service.

## Your Success is our Success Helping Thousands Achieve Their American Dream

### E-2 Case Study: UK Investor Approved to Launch Home Improvement Business in FL
We are pleased to share another success story showcasing how UK investors are building their American dream through the E-2 visa program. One of our clients, a citizen of the United Kingdom, has received E-2 visa approval through the US consulate in London. This approval authorizes him to develop and direct a Florida-based enterprise focused on home improvement products and services.

## What Clients Say About Our Immigration Lawyers

### Today we have our Green Card and will work with Colombo & Hurd again
I highly recommend Colombo & Hurd as attorneys to handle immigration cases to the United States. Colombo and team handled my EB-5 process in an extremely professional manner. From the beginning, we had a clear understanding of how it worked, the risks, and the steps involved in the process. They were always available to answer questions or explain any aspect again. Today we have our Green Card and will work with Colombo & Hurd again whenever necessary.

### We were able to complete the entire process in record time
Colombo & Hurd’s consulting services for obtaining my family’s EB-5 visa were excellent! We were able to complete the entire process in record time, without any errors or need to rework the information requested by U.S. immigration.

### A level of professionalism, commitment, and empathy that far exceeded my expectations
I highly recommend Colombo & Hurd! From the very beginning, they showed a level of professionalism, commitment, and empathy that far exceeded my expectations. Every step of the process was handled with clarity, transparency, and truly impeccable attention to detail.

### I had my EB-5 application approved through Colombo & Hurd
I had my EB-5 process approved through Colombo & Hurd, and today I already have my green card. I highly recommend the services of this firm. Dr. Carlos Colombo and his team of professionals are highly qualified and experienced.
